output.final_deliverable:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Contents
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents/Categorization

Verified adjacency (showing URL[3] links to URL[4]):
- Page visited: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents
- Evidence found on that page (excerpt showing link): the page contains an internal link to /wiki/Portal:Contents/Categorization (displayed as "Portal:Contents/Categorization").
- Source URL where link was observed: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents

Summary: I started at the Wikipedia Main Page and followed links found on each visited page to build a 4-URL chain. Each next URL is a link discovered on the previous page; I verified at least one adjacency by showing that the Portal:Contents page contains a link to Portal:Contents/Categorization (URL 3 -> URL 4).
output.action_summary: Chain of 4 Wikipedia URLs starting from Main Page with one verified adjacency (Portal:Contents -> Portal:Contents/Categorization).
